original: Your shield can’t hold out anymore, and the thick whip of lithe muscle carries straight on into you.
Already relaxed by the previous dose, you find yourself excited by this one! Arousal thunders through your veins, pouring into your crotch.
You grit your teeth as you feel venom work its way into your bloodstream, tightening up your muscles and clouding your mind.
You manage to wrench yourself clear.

Your movements are limited in this pit of writhing, sighing flesh, and you can’t get yourself clear of it in time. A few moments more of sinuous movement, and you are completely bound in the naleen’s coils.
, stroking your [pc.hair] as she does so
